reversed_friendship: A friendship where different values, working styles, or goals create friction. Communication and compromise are needed.

name: Four of Pentacles
upright_meaning: The Four of Pentacles grips its coins tightly. A desire for security and stability drives careful conservation of resources — but be careful that prudence doesn't become greed.
reversed_meaning: Financial insecurity leads to either reckless overspending or extreme hoarding. The relationship with money needs examination.
upright_love: A tendency to hold on too tightly in relationships out of fear of loss. Love cannot grow when held in a clenched fist.
reversed_love: Financial stress creating tension, or a partner who is controlling about money. Generosity creates connection.
upright_career: Financial prudence and careful resource management ensure stability. Smart saving and conservative investment strategies.
reversed_career: Financial hoarding prevents the investment needed for growth, or financial recklessness undermines security.
upright_friendship: A friend who guards their time, energy, and resources carefully. While self-protection is valid, generosity deepens bonds.
reversed_friendship: Financial dynamics creating tension in a friendship — either someone is too tight or too free with money.

name: Five of Pentacles
upright_meaning: The Five of Pentacles finds you out in the cold — materially, spiritually, or emotionally. Financial difficulty or a sense of being left behind creates isolation. Look up — help is closer than you think.
reversed_meaning: The worst of the financial or spiritual hardship is passing. Help arrives and recovery begins.
upright_love: Financial stress or a sense of spiritual poverty strains the relationship. You may feel alone even with a partner. Seek support together.
reversed_love: A relationship recovering from financial difficulty or emotional isolation. Reconnection and support rebuild the bond.
upright_career: Financial hardship or job loss creates professional insecurity. Reach out for support — many resources exist that you may not be accessing.
reversed_career: Financial recovery after a difficult period. New employment or income streams begin to stabilize the situation.
upright_friendship: Feeling left out or isolated from your friend circle, possibly due to financial inequality. Don't suffer in silence.
reversed_friendship: Reconnecting with friends after a period of isolation. Community and belonging return.

name: Six of Pentacles
upright_meaning: The Six of Pentacles embodies the beautiful flow of generosity — giving freely and receiving graciously. Prosperity is meant to be shared, and sharing creates more abundance.
reversed_meaning: Charity with strings attached, or a power dynamic where generosity is used as control. Gifts that create debt rather than connection.
upright_love: Generous, balanced giving and receiving in a relationship. Prosperity flows between partners without keeping score.
reversed_love: Power dynamics around money or generosity in the relationship. One partner holds financial control as a form of power.
upright_career: Generous salary, fair pay, or a role where you can contribute meaningfully to others. The flow of professional generosity works in your favor.
reversed_career: Underpaid, undervalued, or tied to a job through financial dependency. Examine the power dynamics at play.
upright_friendship: A generous, giving friendship where both people contribute meaningfully. Material generosity strengthens the bond.
reversed_friendship: A friendship where money or generosity creates an uncomfortable power imbalance.

name: Seven of Pentacles
upright_meaning: The farmer surveys his crop — growth takes time. The Seven of Pentacles calls for patience and long-term vision. Your investments, though slow, are producing real results.
reversed_meaning: Impatience or poor investment strategy undermines long-term growth. Cutting corners now will cost you later.
upright_love: A relationship that grows slowly but steadily, built through consistent effort and long-term investment. Don't rush what needs time to mature.
reversed_love: Impatience in love leads to rushing a relationship before it's ready, or giving up just before a breakthrough.
upright_career: Your long-term career investments are beginning to bear fruit. Stay the course — the results of sustained effort are coming.
reversed_career: Lack of patience or poor long-term planning undermines professional growth. Reassess your strategy.
upright_friendship: A friendship that deepens over time through consistent investment and patience. These slow-grown connections are the most durable.
reversed_friendship: Impatience with a friendship's pace or poor investment of time and energy creates a shallow connection.

name: Eight of Pentacles
upright_meaning: The Eight of Pentacles is the master craftsperson at work — dedicated, focused, and committed to excellence. Skill development and diligent practice are your path to mastery.
reversed_meaning: Perfectionism creating paralysis, or the opposite — cutting corners and producing shoddy work. Find the balance between excellence and completion.
upright_love: Dedicated effort to become a better partner. Love as a craft — studying, learning, and growing into the best version of yourself in relationship.
reversed_love: Perfectionism in love creates impossible standards, or a lack of effort means the relationship isn't getting the attention it deserves.
upright_career: Deep dedication to your craft and professional mastery. The hours you put in are building genuine expertise that will pay dividends.
reversed_career: Perfectionism blocks productivity, or cutting corners undermines the quality that leads to real success.
upright_friendship: Putting genuine effort into being a great friend. Showing up consistently, listening deeply, and working at the relationship.
reversed_friendship: A friendship that isn't receiving the dedication it needs, or perfectionism that prevents genuine vulnerability.

name: Nine of Pentacles
upright_meaning: The Nine of Pentacles is the embodiment of elegant self-sufficiency — you have created abundance through your own efforts and now enjoy it with refined grace.
reversed_meaning: Material abundance without self-worth, or reckless spending that undermines true financial security. Examine your relationship with money and self.
upright_love: You are complete in yourself and attract love from a place of wholeness, not need. A self-sufficient love that enriches without depending.
reversed_love: Seeking security through a partner rather than building your own. Financial dependence creating relationship imbalance.
upright_career: Financial independence and career success built on your own merit. You've created something to be proud of through sustained effort.
reversed_career: Financial recklessness or over-reliance on others undermines your professional independence. Build your own security.
upright_friendship: You are a self-sufficient, independent friend who enhances others' lives without needing them to fill a void.
reversed_friendship: Over-reliance on friends for emotional or material support creates an unhealthy dynamic. Cultivate your own resources.

name: Ten of Pentacles
upright_meaning: The Ten of Pentacles represents enduring wealth, family legacy, and lasting success that transcends generations. You are building something that will stand the test of time.
reversed_meaning: Family conflict over finances, or a legacy that is crumbling. Short-term thinking destroys what took generations to build.
upright_love: A love that creates lasting family and generational stability. This relationship is the foundation of a beautiful legacy.
reversed_love: Family conflict or financial issues threatening the foundation of a long-term relationship. Protect what you've built together.
upright_career: Legacy-building career success. You're creating something that will endure — a business, a reputation, a body of work that stands the test of time.
reversed_career: A professional legacy that is crumbling, or family-owned business conflict. Stabilize the foundations before they collapse.
upright_friendship: Friendships that span generations and feel like family. Bonds that are woven into the fabric of your life's legacy.
reversed_friendship: Old, established friend groups experiencing conflict over material issues or shifting values.

name: Page of Pentacles
upright_meaning: The Page of Pentacles is the dedicated student of the material world — diligent, curious, and committed to developing the skills that build lasting success.
reversed_meaning: Procrastination and wasted potential. A learning opportunity is being squandered through lack of discipline or focus.
upright_love: A relationship that is carefully, diligently tended. Taking the time to learn how to love well — showing up, studying your partner, and growing together.
reversed_love: Lack of effort or follow-through in building a relationship. Good intentions without consistent action.
upright_career: A new skill or educational opportunity that will build your financial future. Commit to the learning process with patience.
reversed_career: Procrastination and lack of follow-through on career development. Wasted opportunities due to inconsistency.
upright_friendship: A new friendship where you're learning how to show up as a friend in practical, meaningful ways.
reversed_friendship: A friendship where good intentions aren't backed by consistent follow-through. Words without action.

name: Knight of Pentacles
upright_meaning: The Knight of Pentacles is the reliable workhorse — methodical, dependable, and deeply committed to doing things right, even if it takes time. Slow and steady wins the race.
reversed_meaning: Boredom, laziness, or feeling stuck in a rut. The grind has lost its meaning. Find a way to reignite the motivation.
upright_love: A reliable, consistent partner who shows love through steady, dependable action. Not flashy, but deeply trustworthy.
reversed_love: Boredom and routine have drained the romance from the relationship. Introduce some spontaneity without sacrificing stability.
upright_career: Methodical hard work and reliable productivity are your professional superpowers. You're the one everyone counts on to deliver.
reversed_career: Stuck in a professional rut with no motivation to change. Laziness or perfectionism blocking progress.
upright_friendship: The most reliable friend you'll ever have. They always show up, always follow through, and always have your back.
reversed_friendship: A friendship that has become routine and boring. Inject some novelty and shared adventure.

name: Queen of Pentacles
upright_meaning: The Queen of Pentacles is the master of creating material abundance and warm, nurturing home environments. Practical, grounded, and deeply generous with her resources.
reversed_meaning: Financial independence issues, smothering behavior, or neglecting self-care in service of others. You cannot pour from an empty cup.
upright_love: A partner who loves through practical nurturing — creating a warm, secure home and generously providing for those they love.
reversed_love: Smothering love or financial dynamics creating imbalance in the relationship. Self-care is essential for healthy love.
upright_career: A natural at balancing career success with creating abundance in all areas. Your practical wisdom makes you an invaluable professional asset.
reversed_career: Work-life imbalance or financial independence issues affecting professional performance. Address the underlying instability.
upright_friendship: The friend who nurtures everyone with practical generosity — cooking, hosting, remembering birthdays, showing up with what's needed.
reversed_friendship: Over-nurturing a friend to the point of smothering, or exhausting yourself by giving too much.

name: King of Pentacles
upright_meaning: The King of Pentacles has mastered the material world — abundant, secure, and deeply generous. He leads with a steady hand and a full treasury, providing stability for all in his domain.
reversed_meaning: Greed, financial irresponsibility, or corruption tarnish the King's material success. Wealth without integrity is just gilded rot.
upright_love: A partner who provides financial security, material comfort, and steady, unwavering love. This relationship is a safe harbor.
reversed_love: Financial irresponsibility or greed creating relationship instability. Material security cannot substitute for genuine emotional connection.
upright_career: Exceptional material success through ambitious, disciplined leadership. You build empires with patient strategy and unshakeable confidence.
reversed_career: Financial irresponsibility, corruption, or greed undermining professional success and reputation.
upright_friendship: A generous, stable friend who creates abundance in your life through both material and emotional investment.
reversed_friendship: A friend whose relationship with money or status creates tension. Generosity must come without strings.
